title: D3.2.2: Guidelines for predictive differential irrigation scheduling and water application
subtitle: WP3.2 – Upscaling VRT for nutrient and water efficiency and yield optimization
description: A guide for predictive differential irrigation scheduling and water application that integrates remote sensing, soil sensor networks, and weather forecasting into a webGIS platform to optimize water use efficiency. It describes methods to estimate and forecast crop water requirements using multispectral imagery-based crop coefficients, reference evapotranspiration, and soil water balance for near-real-time monitoring and weekly irrigation planning.
